summary: The user sought advice on pet food brands after ordering from Chewy.com and using a 10% off coupon. The discussion covered the differences between grain-free and natural pet foods, recommendations for high-quality natural brands, and strategies to make pet food purchases more affordable, including the use of cashback apps like Ibotta and Fetch Rewards.
facts: The user ordered pet food from Chewy.com and used a 10% off coupon. The user is considering switching their pet's food to a natural brand. The user has been using cashback apps like Ibotta and Fetch Rewards for purchases. The user is looking for ways to maximize cashback earnings on pet food purchases. The user is not sure if their pet would do well on a grain-free diet since they are not having any digestive issues. The user is exploring options for natural pet food brands that are high in quality and have good customer reviews. The user is concerned about the cost of natural pet food. The user has a pet but did not specify the type or name.
